title: npm Trusted Publishing Implementation
description: Walkthrough of changes to enable npm Trusted Publishing with OIDC and migrate the update mechanism from GitHub-direct to npm-based

steps.title: Test file exclusion via files field negation
steps.description: Added negation patterns !dist/**/*.test.js and !dist/**/*.test.d.ts to the files array. With npm 11, root .npmignore is ignored when files is present, so negation patterns in files are the effective exclusion mechanism.

steps.title: Repository metadata for npm Trusted Publishing
steps.description: Added repository field with type:git and the exact GitHub URL. This is required by npm Trusted Publishing to match the OIDC identity from GitHub Actions.

steps.title: Publish configuration
steps.description: Added publishConfig with access:public (required for scoped packages), provenance:true (enables supply chain attestation), and registry URL.

steps.title: Extended InstallSource type with npm mode
steps.description: Added 'npm' to the mode union type and a version?: string field. This allows the config system to track npm-sourced installations alongside legacy GitHub installations.

steps.title: NPM_PACKAGE constant
steps.description: Central definition of the npm package name, used by both version checking and install commands.

steps.title: fetchLatestVersion - npm registry query
steps.description: Replaces fetchRemoteSha for the npm-based flow. Uses npm view to query the registry for the latest published version. Returns null on any failure (network, npm not found, package not published).

steps.title: isNewerVersion - semver comparison
steps.description: Minimal numeric comparison of major.minor.patch. Returns false on parse failure (defensive). No external semver library needed.

steps.title: Import changed to NPM_PACKAGE
steps.description: Now imports NPM_PACKAGE instead of CANONICAL_REPO/CANONICAL_BRANCH. The install spec on line 15 becomes @projectxinnovation/helix-cli@latest.

steps.title: isCanonicalSource accepts npm mode
steps.description: Returns true for mode==='npm' unconditionally (any npm registry install is canonical). Still accepts legacy github mode with repo/branch check for backward compatibility during transition.

steps.title: runUpdate uses npm version comparison
steps.description: Calls fetchLatestVersion() then compares with getPackageVersion() using isNewerVersion(). Saves config with mode:'npm' and version field on success.

steps.title: checkAutoUpdate uses npm-based flow
steps.description: Same npm-based pattern as runUpdate but runs silently. Gets local version from getPackageVersion(), checks remote via fetchLatestVersion(), compares with isNewerVersion().

steps.title: Help text updated
steps.description: Changed from 'Check for and apply updates from GitHub main' to 'Check for and apply updates from npm'.

steps.title: OIDC permissions for Trusted Publishing
steps.description: id-token:write enables GitHub Actions to request an OIDC token. contents:read allows checkout. No NPM_TOKEN or NODE_AUTH_TOKEN needed.

steps.title: Tarball pack and validation
steps.description: npm pack creates the actual tarball, tar -tzf lists contents, then grep checks for dist/index.js presence and test file absence. This validates the artifact, not the working tree.

steps.title: Publish validated tarball with provenance
steps.description: npm publish *.tgz --provenance publishes the exact tarball that was validated, with supply chain attestation.
